form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN H on April 7 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Raynor beaten 5.5 lengths (26.14). More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN H on April 7 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Raynor beaten 5.5 lengths (26.14). More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Warragul when a 1.3 lengths third but did clock a slick 25.94 over the 460m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at Warragul when a 1.3 lengths third but did clock a slick 25.94 over the 460m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Turned head and visibly eased in home straight.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 10 length fifth over 460m at Warragul. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 10 length fifth over 460m at Warragul. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Warragul then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (28.45) at Bendigo. Has ability and worth including among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at Warragul then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (28.45) at Bendigo. Has ability and worth including among the chances.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Repellent, beaten 8 lengths (24.12) in a Mix 6/7. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Repellent, beaten 8 lengths (24.12) in a Mix 6/7. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Bendigo, clocking a slick 23.97 over the 425m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance leading throughout to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Bendigo, clocking a slick 23.97 over the 425m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked, stumbled and lost ground home straight.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 435m at this track in a handy (24.54), beating Simba Rose. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 435m at this track in a handy (24.54), beating Simba Rose. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (24.61) over 435m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (24.61) over 435m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.3 lengths at this track (25.17) beating Taylor's Girl in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 8 four days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning by 1.3 lengths at this track (25.17) beating Taylor's Girl in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 8 four days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (25.26) at big odds over 435m at this track. Has to do a bit more.
